title: agropyron pectinatum f. elatius
intro: Agropyron pectinatum f. elatius, also known as green bent or creeping bent, is a type of grass native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Agropyron pectinatum f. elatius can be prepared as a tea or decoction, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
